detail: Understanding that growth takes time, and rushing love only diminishes its beauty.

lesson: Love is choosing each other every day.
detail: Not just on the easy days, but especially when life gets hard.
Listening more than speaking, and seeing the world through each other's eyes.
Two individuals united in purpose, facing every challenge together.
Letting go of pride and choosing connection over being right.
Finding joy in each other's victories, no matter how small.
